/usr/bin/ar qc liblib_mmwis.a CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/tools/mmwis_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/ils/ils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/ils/local_search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/hils/Solution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/greedy_mis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/greedy_vertex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/greedy_mwis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/greedy_weighted_vertex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/random_mis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/initial_mis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/cyclicFast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/data_structure/mis_permutation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/data_structure/candidate_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/data_structure/operation_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/data_structure/priority_queues/bucket_array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/kernel/branch_and_reduce_algorithm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/kernel/cout_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/kernel/reductions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/extern/struction/lib/mis/kernel/struction_reductions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/extern/struction/lib/mis/kernel/struction_branch_and_reduce_algorithm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/extern/struction/lib/mis/kernel/extended_struction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/extern/struction/lib/mis/kernel/key_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/extern/struction/lib/mis/kernel/mwis_finder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/extern/struction/lib/mis/kernel/original_struction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/max_flow/bipartite_weighted_vertex_cover.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/evolutionary/population_mis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/evolutionary/reduction_evolution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/evolutionary/separator_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/evolutionary/combine/combine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/evolutionary/combine/cover_combine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/evolutionary/combine/separator_combine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_mmwis.dir/lib/mis/evolutionary/combine/multiway_combine.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblib_mmwis.a
